heading: Rules and regulations
label: 9b Rules and regulations
text: The Secretary of Labor shall prescribe rules and regulations for the enforcement of sections 9 and 9a of this title.
notes: CodificationThis section and sections 9 and 9a of this title comprised sections 1 to 3 of act , which were to terminate one year after , pursuant to section 4 of act , set out as a Codification note under . Such sections were temporarily extended by acts , and , and were made permanent by act .Apr. 13, 1934Apr. 13, 1934Apr. 13, 1934Apr. 11, 1935June 15, 1937Apr. 15, 1939section 9 of this title
